Note: (1) The maximum age limit for appointment by transfer on deputation shall be, not exceeding 56 years of age, as on the closing date of receipt of application. Note: (2) Period of deputation shall ordinarily not to exceed three years. Does not exist For approval of recruitment rules. Yo Gzle-2 . [F.No. 15-23/2012-NTCA] Dr. RAJESH GOPAL, Member Secy.
